title: Central Government hereby appoints Ms.Revathi Ramachandran as the Director of Kalakshetra Foundation, Chennai, on contract basis for a periodof three years w.e.f 17.04.2018

(अ).— — — —के瀈灶ीय सरकार, कला楹े灴 灹ित瀠ठान, अिधिनयम, 1993 (1994 का 6) क琉 धारा (19) क琉 उप-धारा (1) 獧ारा 灹द瀄त शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए सु炈ी रेवती रामच瀈灶न को 17 अ灹ैल, 2018 से तीन वष榁 क琉 अविध के िलए संिवदा आधार पर कला楹े灴 灹ित瀠ठान, चे瀈नई के िनदेशक के 牲प म犆 िनयु榉त करती है। [फा.सं. 11-4/2017-अकादमी] एम. एल. 炈ीवा瀡तव, संयु榉त सिचव MINISTRY OF CULTURE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th April, 2018 S.O. 1686(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section (19) of the Kalakshetra Foundation Act, 1993 (6 of 1994), the Central Government hereby appoints Ms. Revathi Ramachandran as the Director of Kalakshetra Foundation, Chennai, on contract basis for a period of three years with effect from the 17th day of April, 2018. [F. No. 11-4/2017-Akad.] M.L. SRIVASTAVA, Jt.
